title: Review Moderation Dashboard Requirement Context
summary: Provide an internal admin workflow for reviewing user-submitted feedback records, inspecting long feedback text, filtering records, and updating review status.
known_facts: The feature is for internal admin users.
Admin users need to review user-submitted feedback records.
The listing must show long feedback text in a readable way without breaking the layout.
Admin users must be able to inspect the full feedback content.
Admin users must be able to filter feedback records.
Admin users must be able to update the review status.
Suggested anonymized fields are id, submitted_by, feedback_text, feedback_type, review_status, review_notes, submitted_at, reviewed_at, and reviewed_by.
Suggested review status values are pending, approved, rejected, and needs_follow_up.
The exact source table or collection is not provided yet.
The exact filter set is not fully confirmed yet.
The exact authorization rule for admin access is not provided yet.
required_unknowns: source table or collection for feedback records
client_questions: What is the source table or collection for feedback records?
Which filters are required for the Review Moderation Dashboard?
What authorization rule should be used to restrict access to internal admin users?

required_test_cases.name: Validate long feedback text display
required_test_cases.given: A feedback record has a long feedback_text value
required_test_cases.expected: The admin listing remains readable and the layout does not break.

required_test_cases.name: Validate full feedback inspection
required_test_cases.given: An admin user selects a feedback record
required_test_cases.expected: The full feedback_text content is available for review.

required_test_cases.name: Validate review status update
required_test_cases.given: An admin user updates review_status and review_notes
required_test_cases.expected: The updated moderation values are saved and returned correctly.
